ogTitle: Wild Dog Valley vs Wilkur: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wild Dog Valley and Wilkur.
heading: Wild Dog Valley vs Wilkur — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wild Dog Valley, Victoria and Wilkur, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wild Dog Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Wilkur (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wild Dog Valley or Wilkur safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wild Dog Valley has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Wilkur scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wild Dog Valley scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Wilkur scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wild Dog Valley or Wilkur?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wild Dog Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
